grammarly.name: Grammarly

plans.name: Free
plans.key_limits: Basic grammar and spelling checks, limited suggestions

plans.name: Premium
plans.key_limits: Full grammar, clarity, tone, style, and plagiarism checks

plans.name: Business
plans.key_limits: All Premium features plus team analytics, style guides, SAML SSO

grammarly.notes: Premium monthly (not annual) rate is ~$30/mo. Business requires 3+ seats minimum.

writesonic.name: Writesonic

plans.name: Free
plans.key_limits: 10,000 words/month, limited Chatsonic access, 1 user

plans.name: Chatsonic
plans.key_limits: Unlimited Chatsonic, GPT-4 & Claude access, 1 user

plans.name: Individual
plans.key_limits: Unlimited words, all AI models, SEO checker, 1 user

plans.name: Teams
plans.key_limits: Unlimited words, API access, custom workflows, team collaboration, 5+ users

writesonic.notes: Teams plan starts at $500/mo and scales with seat count. Annual billing available for discounts.

surfer.name: Surfer SEO

plans.name: Essential
plans.key_limits: 30 articles/month, content editor, keyword research, 1 user

plans.name: Advanced
plans.key_limits: 100 articles/month, SERP analyzer, NLP, 5 users

plans.name: Max
plans.key_limits: Unlimited articles, white-label, API access, 10 users

surfer.notes: 7-day free trial available on all paid plans. Annual billing saves ~17%.

semrush.name: Semrush

plans.name: Pro
plans.key_limits: 5 projects, 500 keywords tracked, 10,000 results per report, 1 user

plans.name: Guru
plans.key_limits: 15 projects, 1,500 keywords tracked, content marketing platform, 1 user

plans.name: Business
plans.key_limits: 40 projects, 5,000 keywords tracked, API access, white-label, 1 user

semrush.notes: Free trial available (limited features). Extra users billed separately. Annual billing saves ~17%.

elevenlabs.name: ElevenLabs

plans.name: Free
plans.key_limits: 10,000 characters/month, 3 custom voices, watermarked audio

plans.name: Starter
plans.key_limits: 30,000 characters/month, 10 custom voices, commercial license

plans.name: Creator
plans.key_limits: 100,000 characters/month, 30 custom voices, voice cloning

plans.name: Pro
plans.key_limits: 500,000 characters/month, 160 custom voices, high-priority rendering

elevenlabs.notes: Enterprise plan available with custom pricing. Characters roll over on paid plans.

murf.name: Murf AI

plans.name: Free
plans.key_limits: 10 minutes voice generation, 10 voices, no downloads

plans.name: Creator
plans.key_limits: 2 hours voice generation/month, 120+ voices, HD downloads, 1 user

plans.name: Business
plans.key_limits: 8 hours voice generation/month, all voices, API access, 3 users

murf.notes: Annual billing saves up to 33%. Enterprise plan available with custom pricing.

jasper.name: Jasper AI

plans.name: Creator
plans.key_limits: Unlimited AI-generated words, 50+ templates, 1 user, 1 brand voice

plans.name: Pro
plans.key_limits: Unlimited words, 3 brand voices, collaboration features, AI image generation, up to 5 users

plans.name: Business
plans.key_limits: Custom word limits, SSO, API access, dedicated support, unlimited users

jasper.notes: Business plan requires contacting sales. Annual billing saves ~20%. 7-day free trial on Creator and Pro.

copyai.name: Copy.ai

plans.name: Free
plans.key_limits: 2,000 words/month, 90+ templates, 1 user, 1 workspace

plans.name: Pro
plans.key_limits: Unlimited words, all templates, 5 users, priority support, workflow automation

plans.name: Team
plans.key_limits: Unlimited words, 20 users, advanced workflows, API access, custom templates

copyai.notes: Annual billing available. Enterprise plan with custom pricing for large teams.

getresponse.name: GetResponse

plans.name: Free
plans.key_limits: 500 contacts, 1 landing page, basic email sending, no automation

plans.name: Email Marketing
plans.key_limits: 1,000 contacts, unlimited emails, autoresponders, basic segmentation

plans.name: Marketing Automation
plans.key_limits: 1,000 contacts, full automation workflows, webinars (up to 100 attendees), lead scoring

getresponse.notes: Prices scale with contact list size. Ecommerce Marketing plan available at $119/mo. Annual billing saves 18%.

fireflies.name: Fireflies AI

plans.name: Free
plans.key_limits: 800 minutes storage, AI summaries, limited transcription credits

plans.name: Pro
plans.key_limits: Unlimited transcription, 8,000 minutes storage, advanced search, integrations

plans.name: Business
plans.key_limits: Unlimited storage, video recording, custom vocabulary, team analytics

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.key_limits: Custom storage, SSO, dedicated support, private cloud option

fireflies.notes: Pro and Business billed annually by default. Monthly billing available at slightly higher rates.

pictory.name: Pictory AI

plans.name: Starter
plans.key_limits: 30 videos/month, 10 mins max video length, 2M+ stock media, watermark-free

plans.name: Professional
plans.key_limits: 60 videos/month, 20 mins max video length, text-to-video, 1080p export

plans.name: Teams
plans.key_limits: 3 users included, 90 videos/month, team collaboration, shared brand assets

pictory.notes: Annual billing saves ~30%. Enterprise plan available. Free trial offered.

descript.name: Descript

plans.name: Free
plans.key_limits: 1 hour transcription/month, 1 watermarked export/month, basic editing

plans.name: Creator
plans.key_limits: 10 hours transcription/month, unlimited exports, AI tools, screen recording

plans.name: Pro
plans.key_limits: 30 hours transcription/month, overdub voice cloning, advanced AI editing, 4K export

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.key_limits: Unlimited transcription, SSO, advanced permissions, dedicated support

descript.notes: Monthly billing available at higher rates (~$24 Creator, ~$40 Pro). Enterprise requires contacting sales.

quillbot.name: QuillBot

plans.name: Free
plans.key_limits: 125 words per paraphrase, 3 paraphrase modes, basic grammar checker

plans.name: Premium (Monthly)
plans.key_limits: Unlimited paraphrasing, all 8 modes, advanced grammar, plagiarism checker (20 pages/mo)

plans.name: Premium (Annual)
plans.key_limits: Unlimited paraphrasing, all 8 modes, advanced grammar, plagiarism checker (20 pages/mo)

quillbot.notes: Semi-annual plan also available at ~$6.65/mo. Plagiarism checker limited on free tier.
